hero.title: Transform your organization.
hero.subtitle: STC helps companies optimize their processes, drive digital transformation and sustainably improve their performance.

about.title: Who are we?
about.p1: STC is a consulting firm specialized in organizational optimization, digital transformation and business performance improvement. We support organizations in structuring their activities, optimizing their processes and integrating tailored technological solutions.
about.p2: Our approach combines technical expertise with strategic vision to deliver concrete, effective and sustainable solutions.
about.sector: Consulting, audit, organizational and digital transformation, information systems, professional training.
about.desc: STC works with companies to improve their efficiency, strengthen their organization and support their growth through solutions tailored to their challenges.

mission.title: Mission, Vision & Values
mission.mission_text: Support companies in optimizing their performance by implementing organizational and digital solutions tailored to their needs.
mission.vision_text: Become a leading player in Africa in organizational consulting and digital transformation, recognized for its expertise and impact.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Structured solutions to support your transformation and sustainably improve your performance.

org.title: Organizational Consulting & Audit
org.desc: Analysis of your structures, process mapping and recommendations for a more efficient organization.

digital.title: Digital Transformation
digital.desc: Support in digitizing your activities and integrating tailored technological solutions.

process.title: Process Optimization
process.desc: Improving operational efficiency, reducing waste and implementing best practices.

si.title: Information Systems
si.desc: Implementation of CMMS/EAM, data-driven management and business intelligence solutions.

iso.title: ISO & Quality (QMS)
iso.desc: Support towards ISO certifications, implementation of quality management systems.

training.title: Training & Skills Transfer
training.desc: Professional training programs to empower your teams and strengthen their capabilities.

methodology.title: Our Methodology
methodology.subtitle: A structured and proven approach for concrete and lasting results.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.desc: In-depth diagnosis of your organization, processes and existing performance.

structure.title: Structure
structure.desc: Definition of a clear action plan with measurable and achievable objectives.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.desc: Implementation of improvements, process redesign and tool integration.

transform.title: Transform
transform.desc: Change management, team training and results monitoring.

context.title: Contextualized approach
context.desc: Solutions adapted to local realities and specific constraints of each organization.

field.title: Field presence
field.desc: Teams on the ground for hands-on support closest to your operations.

results.title: Measurable results
results.desc: KPIs defined from the start and rigorous performance monitoring.

transfer.title: Skills transfer
transfer.desc: Training and empowerment of your internal teams for lasting impact.

multi.title: Multidisciplinary expertise
multi.desc: Organization, digital, quality and information systems united in one team.

commitment.title: Total commitment
commitment.desc: Direct involvement in execution and implementation, not just advice.

cta.title: Ready to transform your organization?
cta.subtitle: Contact us to discuss your challenges and discover how STC can help you achieve greater performance.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
